prompt:
I need DM 2 for a LinkedIn prospect who accepted my connection 4 days ago but hasn't replied. Profile:

Name: Sarah Chen
Role: Co-founder & CEO
Company: Growlio (SaaS, analytics for D2C brands)
Company size: 4
Bio mentions: ex-Shopify, building out of Toronto
Recent post: shared a thread about how much of her week is going to manual reporting instead of product work

Previous DM I sent (DM 1, Day 0):
"Hey Sarah, thanks for connecting! It looks like you're running Growlio pretty lean which usually means you're wearing more hats than you'd like. What's the part of the business eating the most of your time right now?"

Write DM 2 for Day 4.
assertions: Contains at least one Voss label: 'It sounds like', 'It looks like', 'It seems like', or 'It feels like'
Contains no em dashes (—) — only plain hyphens allowed
Does not contain 'just following up', 'bumping this', 'circling back', or 'touching base'
Does not ask for a call, meeting, Zoom, or 15/20-minute chat
Does not pitch NexusPoint services or drop a case study / result with a percentage
References her specific context (lean team, founder-as-integration-layer, reporting pain from her post, or similar) — not generic
Does not re-use DM 1's exact phrasing like 'wearing more hats' or 'what's eating your time'
